  "findings": [
    "Missing bonding jumper around water meter",
    "Potential shock hazard due to unbonded metallic water piping",
    "Non-compliance with NEC 250.104 bonding requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a bonding jumper around the water meter sized per NEC 250.104 and Table 250.102(C)(1)",
    "Verify continuity of the metallic water piping system to the electrical grounding system",
    "Inspect all accessible bonding connections before final close-out"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 250.104(A) requires a bonding jumper around insulated joints such as water meters to ensure electrical continuity of the metal water piping system. The absence of this jumper creates a risk of shock under fault conditions and leaves the system non-compliant. The stage is rough-complete, so correction is still feasible without major rework.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104(A)",
    "NEC 250.30 (supplementary bonding principles)"
  ]
}
